capability_declaration.evidence: SunSpec Metadata Model (Section 3) & Device Type blocks; Modbus register maps for Models 102/207
capability_declaration.rationale: Enables static discovery of supported functions via device type and block presence registers. Lacks dynamic semantic self-description or service negotiation protocols required by agentic systems.

bounded_authority.evidence: Metadata Model Analog Value Operating Limit (Min/Max) registers
bounded_authority.rationale: Implicitly bounds commands to hardware electrical ceilings via register limits, but provides no authentication scopes, session expiry, revocation mechanisms, or permission tiers for autonomous agents.

decision_auditability.rationale: Designed as a real-time telemetry/control interface without frameworks to log decisions, attribute command origins, maintain immutable control histories, or satisfy DER market compliance requirements.

data_governance.rationale: Strictly defines low-level register mappings for point-to-point communication; entirely silent on data ownership rights, customer consent frameworks, third-party sharing permissions, or retention mandates.
